title: PI AGENT FULL COURSE: Master Pi Agent in 30 Minutes
summary: David Ondrej teaches a course on Pi Agent, a framework for building real coding agents. The video covers Pi Agent fundamentals in a condensed format and links to a full course on his website.
writeup: This video is a condensed course from David Ondrej on Pi Agent, a framework for building coding agents. It covers Pi Agent fundamentals in roughly 30 minutes, touching on agentic workflows and code generation, and points to a full course hosted on his website. The takeaway is a quick orientation to Pi Agent's basics for those looking to build real coding agents.
